SummonerBarrier.name: Barrier
SummonerBarrier.tooltip: Take <禀赋>Damage</禀赋> for the next {{ f1 }} seconds. Creates a barrier that blocks the next {{ f2 }} damage.

SummonerBoost.name: Cleanse
SummonerBoost.description: Removes crowd control effects from your champion.
SummonerBoost.tooltip: Remove all crowd control effects from your champion.

SummonerDot.name: Ignite
SummonerDot.description: Ignites target enemy champion, dealing damage over time.
SummonerDot.tooltip: Deal <禀赋>Damage</禀赋> to target enemy champion over {{ f1 }} seconds. Grants vision of the target.

SummonerExhaust.name: Exhaust
SummonerExhaust.description: Exhausts target enemy champion, reducing their damage and movement speed.
SummonerExhaust.tooltip: Exhaust target enemy champion. Reduces their damage by {{ f2 }} and movement speed by {{ f1 }} for {{ f3 }} seconds.

SummonerFlash.name: Flash
SummonerFlash.description: Teleports your champion a short distance toward your cursor's location.
SummonerFlash.tooltip: Teleports your champion a short distance toward your cursor's location.

SummonerHaste.name: Ghost
SummonerHaste.description: Your champion gains increased movement speed and can move through units for a short duration.
SummonerHaste.tooltip: Your champion gains increased movement speed and can move through units for {{ f1 }} seconds.

SummonerHeal.name: Heal
SummonerHeal.description: Restores health to your champion and nearby allies.
SummonerHeal.tooltip: Restores health to your champion and nearby allies for {{ f1 }}.

SummonerSmite.name: Smite
SummonerSmite.description: Deals damage to a target enemy or neutral monster.
SummonerSmite.tooltip: Deal {{ f1 }} damage to target enemy or neutral monster.

SummonerTeleport.name: Teleport
SummonerTeleport.description: After channeling, your champion teleports to a target allied structure.
SummonerTeleport.tooltip: After channeling for {{ f1 }} seconds, your champion teleports to a target allied structure.
